# Avatar Requirements Checklist: Buyer Avatar

- **Purpose**: Validate the quality, clarity, and completeness of buyer avatar requirements before task generation and implementation readiness
- **Created**: 2026-05-17
- **Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are avatar upload, preview, save, cancel, and replacement requirements all explicitly defined? [Completeness, Spec §User Stories 1-2]
- [ ] CHK002 Are requirements defined for the case where the buyer updates profile details without changing the avatar? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications, Plan §Backend Changes]
- [ ] CHK003 Are requirements defined for including `AvatarFileId` only when a buyer selects a new avatar? [Completeness, Plan §Frontend Order]
- [ ] CHK004 Are default-avatar requirements complete for buyers with no saved custom avatar or a not-yet-ready custom avatar? [Completeness, Spec §FR-013, Spec §Key Entities]
- [ ] CHK005 Are buyer app display surfaces for the updated avatar clearly bounded to profile and existing account/header/avatar locations? [Completeness, Spec §Assumptions, Plan §Summary]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK006 Is "valid avatar image" defined with explicit formats and maximum file size? [Clarity, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK007 Is the no-file-name-display requirement specific about where the selected file name must not appear? [Clarity, Spec §FR-014]
- [ ] CHK008 Is the meaning of "save" clear when both profile fields and avatar selection may be changed in one profile update? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006, Plan §API Endpoints]
- [ ] CHK009 Is the pending-avatar state clear enough to distinguish a selected local preview from a saved-but-not-processed avatar URL? [Clarity, Spec §Edge Cases, Data Model §Buyer Profile]
- [ ] CHK010 Is the term `AvatarFileId` consistently tied to a MediaService file ID rather than a public image URL? [Clarity, Plan §Backend Changes, Contract §Request]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK011 Do spec and plan agree that avatar changes reuse `PUT /api/v1/users/me` rather than a dedicated avatar endpoint? [Consistency, Spec §Clarifications, Plan §API Endpoints]
- [ ] CHK012 Do accepted avatar formats and size limits align across spec, plan, contract, and quickstart? [Consistency, Spec §Assumptions, Plan §Constraints, Contract §Validation]
- [ ] CHK013 Do failure requirements consistently preserve the previously saved avatar across invalid file, canceled edit, failed save, and interrupted processing cases? [Consistency, Spec §FR-007, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK014 Are MediaService ownership requirements consistent with UserService profile ownership requirements? [Consistency, Plan §Service Placement, Data Model §Relationships]
- [ ] CHK015 Do frontend UX requirements align with shared-component reuse expectations without requiring a global shared component behavior change? [Consistency, Plan §Frontend Order, Research §Hide Selected File Name]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK016 Are success criteria measurable without depending on implementation-specific internals? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §Success Criteria]
- [ ] CHK017 Can the 5-second updated-avatar outcome be objectively evaluated given asynchronous media processing? [Measurability, Spec §SC-002, Plan §Performance Goals]
- [ ] CHK018 Is the "unsupported or oversized files are rejected" outcome measurable for all accepted and rejected file categories? [Measurability, Spec §SC-003]
- [ ] CHK019 Are usability criteria sufficient to evaluate whether buyers understand saved, failed, and pending states? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-004]
- [ ] CHK020 Is the no-manual-refresh expectation tied to explicit profile refresh or polling behavior in the implementation plan? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-002, Tasks §T014]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK021 Are primary flow requirements complete for selecting, previewing, saving, and later seeing the avatar? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1]
- [ ] CHK022 Are alternate flow requirements complete for selecting multiple images before saving? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK023 Are exception flow requirements complete for invalid type, oversized image, unauthenticated save, and failed upload/save paths? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK024 Are recovery flow requirements defined for refresh during an in-progress save or processing delay? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK025 Are concurrent or multi-tab profile state expectations defined clearly enough for later acceptance tests? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK026 Are requirements defined for media processing success, failure, and delayed public URL resolution? [Edge Case, Plan §Service Placement, Data Model §State Transitions]
- [ ] CHK027 Are requirements defined for preserving or clearing the previous `AvatarUrl` while a new `AvatarFileId` is pending? [Edge Case, Data Model §State Transitions]
- [ ] CHK028 Are requirements defined for invalid `AvatarFileId` values when provided in the existing profile update request? [Edge Case, Contract §Validation]
- [ ] CHK029 Are requirements clear for whether avatar removal without replacement remains out of scope? [Scope, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK030 Are requirements defined for broken image fallback when a saved avatar URL cannot be displayed? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK031 Are security requirements explicit that only the authenticated current user can update their own avatar reference? [Security, Spec §FR-011, Contract §Validation]
- [ ] CHK032 Are file validation requirements sufficient to protect the avatar upload path from unsupported content types and excessive file size? [Security, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK033 Are accessibility requirements specified for avatar image alt text, file input controls, and error messaging? [Gap, Non-Functional]
- [ ] CHK034 Are localization requirements specified for all avatar-related labels, validation messages, pending states, and success/failure notifications? [Coverage, Plan §Frontend Order]
- [ ] CHK035 Are observability requirements defined for failed upload confirmation or media processing failures that affect avatar resolution? [Gap, Non-Functional, Plan §Verification]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK036 Are dependencies on existing MediaService presign/confirm flow and `MediaAssetProcessedIntegrationEvent` documented clearly enough for task generation? [Dependency, Plan §Research Notes]
- [ ] CHK037 Are assumptions about shared media upload and avatar UI primitives validated or marked for implementation inspection? [Assumption, Plan §Frontend Order]
- [ ] CHK038 Are assumptions about existing `AvatarFileId` and `AvatarUrl` storage documented so no unnecessary migration task is created? [Assumption, Plan §Backend Order]
- [ ] CHK039 Are downstream projection/event assumptions documented for why no new user-avatar event is needed? [Assumption, Plan §Integration Events]
- [ ] CHK040 Are out-of-scope boundaries documented for crop tools, avatar removal, seller/admin app UI, and notifications? [Scope, Plan §Scale/Scope]

## Notes

- Checklist items validate requirements quality, not implementation behavior.
- Check items off as completed: `[x]`.
- Add comments or findings inline during review.
